hero.lede: A layered, living, interconnected world. From the solitary land to the entire kingdom, build your lineage, conquer your enemies, write your legend.

presentation.title: Presentation
paragraphs: Dive into the merciless world of SURVAIN, an MMORPG of survival and strategic conquest inspired by Norse mythology. In a kingdom torn apart by war, players take on the role of freed settlers, determined to build villages, forge alliances and prevail against fearsome enemies – human or divine.

With a unique progression system, SURVAIN takes you from solo survival to massive PvP battles, where every decision – whether uniting provinces or overthrowing the Lords – shapes the fate of the world. Thanks to innovative balancing mechanics and an economy regulated by the gods and the rulers, the game delivers an immersive, balanced experience that rewards strategy, loyalty and daring.
Join SURVAIN, where building a community and conquering a kingdom collide with the test of survival.

game.title: From the first ember to the Kingdom's throne
game.lead: Alone in a wild land, you build a village, rally souls to your cause and climb the ranks of a living feudal world — until you weigh on the fate of an entire Kingdom, under the gaze of the Northern gods.

survival.title: Survival, Exploration & Building
survival.text: Four biomes, harsh seasons, wild zones where danger guards the best loot. Gather, craft, build your home.

politics.title: Politics, Economy & Conquest
politics.text: Settler, Baron, Lord, King: an organic rise to power. Taxes, trade routes, castle sieges — balanced battles, no zerg.

gods.title: Favor of the Gods
gods.text: Choose your pantheon, lay down your offerings, trigger rituals and blessings. Wars of religion rage over the sacred relics.

ascension.title: The Ascension
ascension.lead: Four tiers, from the lone homestead to the war of Regions. Each step unlocks new mechanics — and new rivals.

land.name: Land
land.text: Your land, your village, your NPCs. Survival, building and wild zones to explore.

province.name: Province
province.text: Union under a Baron: central market, shared security, first cooperative missions.

region.name: Region
region.text: Castle sieges against organized PvE. A player Lord emerges and assigns the roles.

kingdom.name: Kingdom
kingdom.text: Inter-regional wars, dungeons, factions and a living capital under the King's authority.

tools.intro: Craft tree: resources, buildings, processing, weapons and armour by biome and tier.
